prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: KOL-BLE-3PCMINISTRAINERS-STD Product Type: KITCHEN_TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 3pc Stainless Steel Mini Strainer Set, Compact Nesting Fine Mesh Sifters Cooking Baking Supplies, Silver Description: The Beille 3pc Mini Stainless Steel Strainer and Sifter Set is a budget friendly kitchen essentials item, designed for small prep tasks that full size strainers can make difficult or messy. With three compact fine mesh strainers included, this set is an ideal addition to include with cooking and baking supplies.

Each mini strainer features a stainless steel fine mesh basket that helps sift, strain and separate small ingredients with better control. Use them for dusting powdered sugar over waffles, sifting cocoa powder onto desserts, straining loose leaf tea, filtering lemon seeds from fresh juice, smoothing small batches of gravy and sauces and much more!

The set includes three useful sizes for different prep needs: The large strainer measures 8.5 x 4.0 inches, the medium strainer measures 8.0 x 3.06, and lastly, the small measures 7.5 x 2.75 inches. The assorted sizes make it easy to choose the right mini strainer for dry ingredients, liquids, garnishes, finishing and small portions.

Designed with compact kitchens in mind, the three strainers nest together neatly for easy drawer or cabinet storage. The stainless steel construction offers a classic look that pairs well with everyday kitchen tools, while the dishwasher safe design makes cleanup quick and efficient. Search Terms: Mini strainer; fine mesh strainer; cocktail tea strainer; stainless steel strainer; kitchen gadgets; home and kitchen; kitchen tools essentials accessories; loose leaf tea; match flour sifter; sifter for baking; baking supplies; cooking; meal prep Features: - 3PC MINI STRAINER SET: Everyday kitchen essentials item, this set from Beille includes three fine mesh stainless steel strainers measuring 8.5 x 4.0 inches (large), 8.0 x 3.06 (medium) and 7.5 x 2.75 inches (small) - SMALL FINE MESH SIFTERS: Designed for small kitchen tasks that need more control; use for cocoa powder, powdered sugar, flour, loose leaf tea, gravy, sauces and other fine straining or sifting needs - STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Made from durable stainless steel and all components are dishwasher safe; each handheld strainer comes with handle and is lightweight and easy to control for baking, cooking, drink prep, sauces and more - NESTING DESIGN FOR COMPACT STORAGE: The three mini strainers nest together neatly to help save drawer and cabinet space; handles also allow for hanging storage if desired - COOKING & BAKING SUPPLIES: Use mini strainers for dusting desserts, sifting dry ingredients, straining tea, filtering citrus juice, smoothing sauces and finishing small portions === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 3-pc Mini Stainless Steel Strainer Set

openai.item_name: Beille 3-pk Silver Mini Stainless Steel Strainer Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fine Mesh Sifters, Nesting Design, Dishwasher Safe, Perfect For Tea, Flour, Cocoa, Powdered Sugar

openai.title_differentiation: Fine Mesh, Nesting Design, Dishwasher Safe, For Tea, Cocoa, Sugar, Flour, Sauces, Compact Storage
